creator: maja.reberc@freedommail.ch
text:
Created attachment 246545
Desktop file for /usr/local/share/applications

MuseScore 4.1.1 is missing the desktop file /usr/local/share/applications/musescore.desktop. Therefore, it does not show up in the application menu, and needs to be started from the terminal.

I've provided an example desktop file. We're missing an icon, which I'll attach to the next comment.
